rules.rule_text:
import "pe"

rule LimaAlfa
{

	strings:

			33 C0 
			66 [2]

			81 ?? 00 F0 FF FF 
			81 ?? 00 30 00 00 
			75 ?? 
			8B [3] 
			25 FF 0F 00 00 
			03 C7 
			01 
		}

	condition:
